-- 4 of 37 --

STRAIGHT LINE PERSUASION
The Straight Line Persuasion
System is a proven process for
influencing, controlling, and
negotiating a sale as well as
making yourself known in such
a congruent way that others
are!
Compelled to take action for
the greater good. It's the most
logical, elegant way to
influence somebody because it
cuts to the core of what really
matters.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 5 of 37 --

THE OFFLINE METHOD
Remember, sales is like a straight line, open at one end, closed at the other, with
boundaries above and below the line.
Between those boundaries you develop rapport and gather intelligence by asking
qualifying questions. How you ask those questions determines how much rapport you
build with the client, and ultimately whether or not you make the sale.
Within the boundaries, you are doing two things:
1. ESTABLISHING INSTANT MASSIV'E RAPPORT THROUGH TONALITY AND BODY LANGUAGE.
2. USING THAT RAPPORT TO GATHER INTELLIGENCE, FIND OUT WHAT THE PROSPECT TRULY NEEDS, AND
DETERMINE THEIR TRUE DESIRES.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 7 of 37 --

THE OFFLINE METHOD
Stay within the boundaries
when drafting your copy!
Everything you write must act
to further the sale!
THE STRAIGHT LINE
RAPPORT
YOU
The Promised Land:
Closing the Sale
(Leads to Massive
Wealth & Success)
GATHER INTELLIGENCE (QUALIFYING QUESTIONS)
BOUNDARIES
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 9 of 37 --

WARNING
The tools you learn in the Straight Line System are so powerful
they will make you unstoppable! Once you master these skills,
you will be able to use them in any job you decide to do and in
any situation you encounter in your personal life.
The challenge is that there are unconscious buying triggers and
certain tonal patterns that can make people buy things they
shouldn't, if used the wrong way.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 10 of 37 --

Therefore, it's important that you
remain ethical:
1. NEVER PRESSURE A CLIENT TO DO SOMETHING THEY
SHOULDN'T DO.
2. NEVER PRESSURE A CLIENT TO BUY SOMETHING THEY
SHOULDN'T BUY.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 11 of 37 --

10	10	10
THE POWER OF THE THREE TENS
Your sales copy MUST establish
the 3 tens!
THE THREE 10’S
They must
love your
product
They must trust
and connect with
you
They must trust
and connect with
your company
1. 2. 3.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 13 of 37 --

THE ACTION THRESHOLD:
The Action Threshold is the unconscious set point that
somebody has to be motivated to taking action.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 14 of 37 --

`
Your goal is to "Tip the
Scales," to where the
positives outweigh the
negatives.
POSITIVES
NEGATIVES
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 15 of 37 --

STRAIGHT LINE PERSUASION
When you're going through the Straight Line from open to
close, what you're doing is working to cross the Action
Threshold by knocking out negatives, building up positives, and
changing their beliefs about buying all at the same time
without them even knowing it.
That's what the core of selling is - get someone to a point
where they say "yes."
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

ASSEMBLE A KICK

Revealed!

-- 23 of 37 --

THE
FORMULA
• Step 1 Features
• Step 2 Benefits
• Step 3 Story
• Step 4 Summary
• Step 5 Headline
• Step 6 Call to Action
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 24 of 37 --

STEP 1 FEATURES
Features are what’s inside your product, it’s what it
consists of!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 25 of 37 --

STEP 2 BENEFITS
What makes your product’s features so exciting and useful
to your prospect!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 26 of 37 --

STEP 3 STORY
A story will help suck a prospect in to your letter and make
it impossible to stop reading!
Use your story, or a story of a successful customer.
Use our story formula:
• 1. Problem.
• 2. Why the problem could never be solved.
• 4. Your magic solution.
• 5. The results of you solution to the problem.
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 27 of 37 --

STEP 4 SUMMARY
Stack up the benefits for a big bang!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 28 of 37 --

STEP 5 HEADLINE
Remember Jordan’s 3 second rule! (Sharp as Tack,
Enthusiastic as hell, An Expert In Your Field)
Digg.com
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 29 of 37 --

STEP 6 CALL TO ACTION
Ask for the order!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
